rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input assumptions and output guarantees.
generic_rules: Formulate range assumptions using named constants or visible variables.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean helper declarations for range checks: eq var_name : bool = value >= min and value <= max.
Structure AGREE annex blocks with proper scoping for component types and implementations.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation.
